title: Advanced Arsenal
description: Redstone-powered equipment that can be upgraded to suit your playstyle.
body:
![Advanced Arsenal preview](https://i.ibb.co/5xr2hMSn/modrinth.png)

About

This mod adds redstone-powered equipment meant as viable alternatives to vanilla tools and armors.

It also adds the Advanced Station, a machine that consumes redstone to repair your tools without having to spend xp. It can be automated using hoppers and emits a redstone signal based on how full the redstone gauge is.

Content

Configuration

Some aspects of the mod can be changed in the configuration file.

Tools for modpacks

You can add new redstone fuels for the Advanced Repair Station, using item tags:

• Set as Tier 1 fuel (same as redstone dust): redstone_fuels/tier_1
• Set as Tier 2 fuel (same as redstone block): redstone_fuels/tier_2

Structure is as follows: advanced_arsenal:{tag}

Credits

All custom textures used (if any) are either created by me or have a license that allows modification and distribution.

I make every effort to comply with project license obligations and to always credit the original owners. If you believe your name is missing from the credits or if you decide to change your project's license, please contact me.

Credits:
- Futureazoo's Repository (CC License) as base template for the machine block.
- Malcolmriley's Repository (CC License) as base template some of the items.

Dependencies

This mod has no dependencies.

JEI is recommended for recipes but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the CurseForge launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
